# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
import java.security.MessageDigest

def ALLOWED_COMMANDS = [
    'mvn', 'gradle', 'npm', 'yarn', 'make', 'ant', 'python', 'pytest', 
    'docker', 'kubectl', 'helm', 'terraform', 'ansible-playbook'
]

def ALLOWED_SHELL_CHARS = ~/^[a-zA-Z0-9\s\-_.\/=:@,\[\]{}]*$/
def MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH = 500
def FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS = [
    ~/.*(\||;|&|`|\$\(|\$\{|>|<|\n|\r).*/,
    ~/.*\b(rm\s+-rf|chmod|chown|sudo|su|eval|exec|source|\.|curl.*\||wget.*\|).*/,
    ~/.*\b(passwd|shadow|authorized_keys|id_rsa|\.ssh|\.aws|\.kube).*/
]

properties([
    parameters([
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'nodejs', 'python', 'docker', 'kubernetes'],
            description: 'Select project type'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Build command (e.g., clean install, build, install)'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'TEST_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Test command (e.g., test, verify, test:unit)'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment target (e.g., staging, production)'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip test execution'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Perform dry run without actual deployment'
        )
    ]),
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10')),
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
])

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'secure-build-agent'
    }
    
    options {
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        skipDefaultCheckout()
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_CLEAN = 'true'
        SECURE_MODE = 'true'
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Security Validation') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Security Validation Stage ==="
                    
                    validateParameter('BUILD_COMMAND', params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                    validateParameter('TEST_COMMAND', params.TEST_COMMAND)
                    validateParameter('DEPLOY_TARGET', params.DEPLOY_TARGET)
                    
                    if (!isValidProjectType(params.PROJECT_TYPE)) {
                        error("Invalid project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}")
                    }
                    
                    def allowedTargets = ['dev', 'staging', 'qa', 'production']
                    if (params.DEPLOY_TARGET && !allowedTargets.contains(params.DEPLOY_TARGET)) {
                        error("Invalid deployment target. Allowed: ${allowedTargets.join(', ')}")
                    }
                    
                    if (params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production' && !isAuthorizedForProduction()) {
                        error("User not authorized for production deployment")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Security validation passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Checkout Stage ==="
                    cleanWs()
                    checkout scm
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.BUILD_COMMAND != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Build Stage ==="
                    def sanitizedCommand = sanitizeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                    def buildCmd = constructSecureCommand(params.PROJECT_TYPE, 'build', sanitizedCommand)
                    
                    echo "Executing build command for ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    executeSecureCommand(buildCmd)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS && params.TEST_COMMAND != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Test Stage ==="
                    def sanitizedCommand = sanitizeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND)
                    def testCmd = constructSecureCommand(params.PROJECT_TYPE, 'test', sanitizedCommand)
                    
                    echo "Executing test command for ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    executeSecureCommand(testCmd)
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        archiveTestResults(params.PROJECT_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Scan') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Security Scan Stage ==="
                    performSecurityScan(params.PROJECT_TYPE)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.DEPLOY_TARGET != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploy Stage ==="
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN MODE: Deployment would target ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}"
                        echo "Skipping actual deployment"
                    } else {
                        def deploymentApproved = false
                        
                        if (params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production') {
                            timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                                deploymentApproved = input(
                                    message: "Approve production deployment?",
                                    ok: 'Deploy',
                                    submitterParameter: 'APPROVER'
                                )
                            }
                        } else {
                            deploymentApproved = true
                        }
                        
                        if (deploymentApproved) {
                            performSecureDeployment(params.PROJECT_TYPE, params.DEPLOY_TARGET)
                        } else {
                            error("Deployment not approved")
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed"
        }
    }
}

def validateParameter(String paramName, String paramValue) {
    if (!paramValue) {
        return
    }
    
    if (paramValue.length() > MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH) {
        error("${paramName} exceeds maximum length of ${MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH}")
    }
    
    FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS.each { pattern ->
        if (paramValue =~ pattern) {
            error("${paramName} contains forbidden pattern or command")
        }
    }
    
    if (!(paramValue =~ ALLOWED_SHELL_CHARS)) {
        error("${paramName} contains invalid characters")
    }
}

def sanitizeCommand(String command) {
    if (!command) {
        return ''
    }
    
    def sanitized = command.trim()
        .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\-_.\/=:@,\[\]{}]/, '')
        .replaceAll(/\s+/, ' ')
    
    return sanitized
}

def constructSecureCommand(String projectType, String phase, String userCommand) {
    def baseCommands = [
        'maven': [
            'build': 'mvn',
            'test': 'mvn'
        ],
        'gradle': [
            'build': './gradlew',
            'test': './gradlew'
        ],
        'nodejs': [
            'build': 'npm run',
            'test': 'npm run'
        ],
        'python': [
            'build': 'python -m build',
            'test': 'pytest'
        ],
        'docker': [
            'build': 'docker build',
            'test': 'docker run'
        ],
        'kubernetes': [
            'build': 'kubectl apply',
            'test': 'kubectl get'
        ]
    ]
    
    def baseCmd = baseCommands[projectType]?[phase]
    if (!baseCmd) {
        error("Invalid project type or phase")
    }
    
    def tokens = userCommand.tokenize(' ')
    tokens.each { token ->
        def firstWord = token.split(/\s+/)[0]
        if (!ALLOWED_COMMANDS.any { token.startsWith(it) } && 
            !token.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9\-_.\/=:@,\[\]{}]+$/)) {
            error("Command token not allowed: ${token}")
        }
    }
    
    return "${baseCmd} ${userCommand}"
}

def executeSecureCommand(String command) {
    echo "Executing: ${command}"
    
    def result = sh(
        script: command,
        returnStatus: true
    )
    
    if (result != 0) {
        error("Command failed with exit code ${result}")
    }
}

def isValidProjectType(String projectType) {
    def validTypes = ['maven', 'gradle', 'nodejs', 'python', 'docker', 'kubernetes']
    return validTypes.contains(projectType)
}

def isAuthorizedForProduction() {
    def authorizedUsers = ['admin', 'release-manager', 'devops-lead']
    def currentUser = env.BUILD_USER_ID ?: 'unknown'
    
    return authorizedUsers.contains(currentUser) || 
           env.BRANCH_NAME == 'main' || 
           env.BRANCH_NAME == 'master'
}

def archiveTestResults(String projectType) {
    try {
        switch(projectType) {
            case 'maven':
            case 'gradle':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml, **/build/test-results/**/*.xml'
                break
            case 'nodejs':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/test-results/*.xml'
                break
            case 'python':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/test-reports/*.xml'
                break
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Warning: Could not archive test results: ${e.message}"
    }
}

def performSecurityScan(String projectType) {
    echo "Performing security scan for ${projectType}"
    
    try {
        switch(projectType) {
            case 'maven':
            case 'gradle':
                sh 'echo "Running dependency check"'
                break
            case 'nodejs':
                sh 'npm audit --audit-level=moderate || true'
                break
            case 'python':
                sh 'pip-audit || true'
                break
            case 'docker':
                sh 'echo "Running container scan"'
                break
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Warning: Security scan encountered issues: ${e.message}"
    }
}

def performSecureDeployment(String projectType, String target) {
    echo "Deploying ${projectType} to ${target}"
    
    withCredentials([
        string(credentialsId: "deploy-token-${target}", variable: 'DEPLOY_TOKEN')
    ]) {
        def deployScript = libraryResource "deployment/${projectType}-deploy.sh"
        writeFile file: 'deploy.sh', text: deployScript
        sh 'chmod +x deploy.sh'
        
        sh """
            export DEPLOY_TARGET=${target}
            ./deploy.sh
        """
    }
    
    echo "Deployment to ${target} completed"
}
